title: Advanced Transport Measurement System (ATMS): Supplementary Hardware Design
description: Open source hardware design and supplementary data for the ATMS cryogenic platform. Includes Bill of Materials (BOM), wiring schematics, and mechanical assembly descriptors for the Liquid Nitrogen (77K) and PPMS modules. Designed at UGC-DAE CSR, Mumbai Centre.

creators.name: Deshmukh, Prathamesh
creators.affiliation: UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research, Mumbai Centre
